expo.name: Ocean Collector
expo.description: A cozy ocean treasure journal for shells, shark teeth, sea glass, cleanup moments, and gentle AI-assisted suggestions.

plugins.photosPermission: Ocean Collector uses your beach-find photos so you can save them in your journal and optionally prepare an AI-assisted suggestion.
plugins.cameraPermission: Ocean Collector uses the camera so you can photograph shells, shark teeth, sea glass, and cleanup finds for your private journal.
